meaning: 道森[加拿大西北部城市]
examples: Tourism is now the chief industry of Dawson City.
Dawson bought a thirty-dollar sweater for eighteen dollars on the thirteenth of July.
The whole thing started in 1912 when Charles Dawson claimed to find some interesting bones in a gravel pit.
Is Dawson Geophysical up for sale now that the owner is getting on in years?
Council chairwoman Sarah Dawson said parking on the village green was "against the law".
